author: stephanie
body: aww brilliant video’s, loving the animation..im so glad i managed to get tickets to see the guys on the 20th at shepherds bush!

author: justin
body: yeah i think the guys are wicked, got some real nice tunes and a great live performance to boot, their playing the nme gig tonight with tricky! should be sweet.

author: noah
body:
heard the gig with tricky was pretty bloody good, they did an interview before they went on stage, its cool to here how they run their act, have a read…  
[http://www.artshub.co.uk/uk/news.asp?sc=0&sId=177077](http://www.artshub.co.uk/uk/news.asp?sc=0&sId=177077)

author: Henry
body:
Yeah saw the guys at the shepherds bush gig when they supported tricky, their performance was wicked, such a tight act! Has anyone seen any photo’s that were taken on the night?? I know this where there meant to be posted if anyone took any  
[http://www.flickr.com/photos/one-eskimo/](http://www.flickr.com/photos/one-eskimo/)

author: Ed
body: I so should have gone to the shepherds bush show, have to make do with the hoxton bar & grill show hehe :) be there if you know whats good for ya.

author: Kris
body:
Bet hoxton was dope :)  
i love all the music vids that accompany the tunes on their youtube channel, cant get enough!  
[http://www.youtube.com/user/0neeskim0](http://www.youtube.com/user/0neeskim0)

author: Tom Scott
body: I just cant wait for the album to drop next month now!!!

author: jake selway
body: its now been pushed back till the 22nd of june btw, just thought id tell ya.x
